data.title: Xanadu Becomes First Pure-Play Photonic Quantum Computing Company to Go Public
data.description: Today, Xanadu Quantum Technologies Limited, a prominent player in photonic quantum computing, started trading publicly on the Nasdaq and Toronto Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol "XNDU" as of March 27, 2026.

data.title: NatGold Digital's Appointment of ECM Capital Advisors Expands Its Global Development Network for Qualifying Gold Resources
data.description: On March 27, 2026, NatGold Digital Ltd. revealed a new partnership with ECM Capital Advisors Inc. The agreement aims to facilitate the discovery, introduction, and discussions surrounding potential gold resource ventures. This collaboration marks a significant step for NatGold as it seeks to explore lucrative opportunities in the market.

data.title: Nick Saban Presents Communities In Schools of Atlanta's Top Honor to Mercedes-Benz USA CEO Adam Chamberlain at Annual Choose Success Awards Dinner
data.description: Nick Saban stood under the spotlight on Thursday night in Atlanta, as Chamberlain was awarded the Anne Cox Chambers Champion for Kids Award, with Roark receiving the Corporate Partner Award at a sold-out event. The celebration was a fundraising event benefiting students in metro Atlanta. The gala took place on March 27, 2026, and was attended by a large audience, including prominent figures and supporters. The awards recognized Chamberlain for their exceptional dedication to children's welfare, while Roark was honored for their significant contributions as a corporate partner. The event successfully raised a considerable amount of money for students in the metro Atlanta area.

data.title: Parents of SBF reveal details that lessen likelihood of pardon on betting markets for former FTX CEO.
data.description: According to betting markets, the likelihood of former FTX CEO Sam Bankman-Fried receiving a presidential pardon in the current year seems low.

data.title: Nasus Pharma Advances NS002 Towards Pivotal Study Following Positive Phase 2; Reports Annual Results and Provides Business Update
data.description: Newly released Phase 2 results reveal the promising epinephrine delivery capabilities of NS002, indicating potential to outperform EpiPen®. The data shows a significant enhancement in early absorption rates, setting the stage for a pivotal study scheduled for the fourth quarter of 2026.

data.title: Bitcoin's price plunges to $41K, nearly hitting 3-week low due to oil-supply pressure, dropping below $66,500 on March 9.
data.description: The value of Bitcoin plummeted below $66,500, the lowest point since March 9th, due to a decrease in oil supply. This led to a significant drop in BTC price as it sought out lower levels of liquidity.

data.title: Syntec Optics (Nasdaq: OPTX) Positions for Onshoring of Advanced Optical Systems Under New National Defense Authorization Act (NDAA) Mandate
data.description: On March 23, 2026, Syntec Optics revealed that its vertical integration provides domestic sourcing advantages to optics integrators following the implementation of the National Defense Authorization Act (NDAA). This Act highlights the importance of glass and optical systems in defense technology, emphasizing a transition towards domestic self-sufficiency in this sector. As a result, Syntec's production facilities in the U.S. are now deemed strategically significant. This move positions Syntec to cater to the increased demand from defense tech integrators looking to mitigate risks in their supply chains. Syntec Optics, listed as Nasdaq: OPTX, specializes in critical technologies for defense and various dynamic markets.

data.title: Iterum Therapeutics Announces Filing of Winding Up Petition
data.description: On March 27, 2026, Iterum Therapeutics plc (Nasdaq: ITRM), a company specializing in advanced oral and IV antibiotics for treating infections from multi-drug resistant pathogens, disclosed its filing of a petition in the High Court in Ireland for the winding up of the company. This petition led to the appointment of Damien Murran and Jennifer McMahon from Teneo Restructuring (Ireland) Limited as Joint Provisional Liquidators to oversee the process. The company's focus is on providing solutions for infections in both community and hospital environments.
